default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kick-off meeting for Lane Sync client operations and team restructuring](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Team restructured into three channels for better context and collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [Infrastructure team working on rewriting Flow monolith and splitting SDK packages](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [New freemium version of analytics app planned with separate workflows](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Additional weekly sync meeting added on Tuesdays for progress checks and new requests](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)

## Topics

### Team Restructuring

  - [Team split into three channels for improved context and collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [Aim to reduce context-switching between different PRs and projects](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [Infrastructure team exploring ideas to rewrite Flow monolith and split SDK packages](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [New abstraction for writing agents more easily, similar to Agno](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)

### Freemium Analytics App

  - [New app planned for freemium version of analytics](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Will include workflows for company research, competitor analysis, and prompt finding](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Considering separating code base for freemium app workflows](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Discussing whether to split at worker level or code base level](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)

### Framework Roadmap

  - [Plan to document and share API design for the framework next week](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Will outline how workflows and agentic workflows will be written in the future](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Team to be involved in transition and testing during migration](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Aim to not disrupt current work; framework team will rewrite workflows](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)

### On-Call Rotation

  - [On-call rotation for strategy sprint and support tickets working well](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Low volume of requests from strategy team](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Support tickets have been stable, with only minor issues reported](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)

### Tavily AI Integration

  - [Implementing Tavily AI for web search in workflows](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Tavily offers three endpoints: search, extract, and crawl](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=896.0)
  - [Search endpoint supports various settings that can be defined by the agent based on the request](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
  - [Tavily used by NASA and potentially OpenAI for internal search engines](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=1950.0)

### Ongoing Projects

  - [Progress on image generation for Kadia using GPT and reference images](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=2019.0)
  - [Strapi CMS publishing workflow near completion](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=1814.0)
  - [Sentinel One CVE articles workflow in progress](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=1137.0)
  - [Octave integration request under review due to complexity](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=2466.0)

### Backlog and Prioritization

  - [Team to recalibrate priorities for backlog items](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
  - [Suleman's tasks (Looker reports, manual publishing) tracked separately](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
  - [Unassigned tasks available for team members with bandwidth](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=3649.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kirkland to take on-call duties for the week and notify relevant channels](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=3871.0)
  - [Team to explore backlog for additional tasks if bandwidth allows](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=3591.0)
  - [Follow up with Andy regarding Monograph workflow in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=3772.0)
  - [Stevie to investigate Octave integration request and determine feasibility](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=2536.0)
  - [Daniel to finish agent work and share framework roadmap next week](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [Team to test and provide feedback on recent Task AI improvements in Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/Wj_f1e2s-YW_4wnv_NXnm-mW1kshDWLK?tab=summary&timestamp=3219.0)
